description: Repair allocate_capacity so it allocates integer capacity across request rows. Each row has id, min, desired, and optional priority. Coerce min, desired, priority, and capacity from ints or integer strings; reject booleans, negative min/desired, desired less than min, duplicate ids, malformed rows, and non-integer values with ValueError. First assign every row its min. If capacity is less than total min, raise ValueError. Then distribute remaining units one at a time to rows that are still below desired, choosing higher priority first and breaking ties by original input order; continue cycling through eligible rows until no capacity remains or every desired amount is reached. Return a dict in original id order. Do not mutate inputs.
